summary: Iteration 3 regression + new-feature verification for Nithin Karipalli portfolio. Backend 15/15 pytest pass (health, projects x5 slugs, netflix case study, live GitHub repos on Ni7H1N with cache <5s, stats {5,8,1,263}, contact happy+validation, /resume.pdf). Frontend end-to-end verified: no useNavigate/CommandPalette runtime errors, Cmd/Ctrl+K opens shadcn Command dialog with Navigate/Actions/Projects/Elsewhere groups (all 11 required items + 5 project titles present via data-testid), Escape closes it, copy-email in palette wired, project selection routes to /projects/<slug>, Achievements scroll works. Navbar live-time pill 'HYD HH:MM' present, ⌘K trigger exists. Achievements section has achievement-0..3 with Top 1% / Top 100 / 3rd Place / 263 metrics, 'Proof of practice.' heading and '// signals' marker. Contact copy-email button fires a sonner toast (error toast since clipboard is blocked in headless — acceptable per spec). GlobalNetwork canvas is lazy-mounted via IntersectionObserver (absent on cold load, present within ~1s of scrolling to #network). Section order verified: Hero → DevSecOps → Projects → Cybersecurity → Achievements → Terminal → GlobalNetwork → GitHub → Experience → Certifications → Contact. Terminal 'projects' still lists all 5 slugs. Perf sanity: DOMContentLoaded ~920ms, FCP ~840ms — well under the 5s/3s budget.

issues: Radix a11y warning in console: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for the component to be accessible for screen reader users.' Fires 4x while opening the palette. Non-blocking; fix by wrapping a hidden <DialogTitle> via VisuallyHidden inside CommandPalette.jsx.

action_items: (Minor a11y) Add a VisuallyHidden <DialogTitle> to CommandPalette's CommandDialog to silence the Radix console warning and improve screen-reader UX.
(Carried over, non-blocking) Certifications cards still lack data-testid attributes — inconsistent with the rest of the codebase.
(Carried over) server.py: double sort at ~line 353-354 in _fetch_live_repos; migrate deprecated on_event('shutdown') to lifespan handler.
critical_code_review_comments: CommandPalette.jsx: emits a Radix accessibility console warning on every open because CommandDialog wraps DialogContent without a DialogTitle. Wrap with @radix-ui/react-visually-hidden's Root or shadcn's VisuallyHidden.

CommandPalette.jsx: copy-email path relies on navigator.clipboard.writeText which is undefined on non-secure/older contexts — currently correctly falls back to toast.error, so it's safe, but consider a document.execCommand('copy') fallback for older browsers.
GlobalNetwork.jsx: IntersectionObserver-gated mount works well (canvas absent pre-scroll, present within 1s after entering viewport) — big perf win confirmed.
Home.jsx: section order matches spec and each section carries the expected anchor id — nothing to flag.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_-prefixed contact record inserted during backend suite (name='TEST_Nithin Contact', email='test-contact@example.com'). Safe to leave or purge from db.contact_messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py continues to work against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. New in iter 3: Cmd/Ctrl+K palette (data-testids: command-palette, command-palette-input, palette-nav-<id>, palette-copy-email, palette-resume, palette-project-<slug>); Navbar has data-testid='live-time' (text pattern 'HYD HH:MM') and 'nav-command-palette-open'; Contact has data-testid='contact-copy-email' — a sonner toast will appear (success or error toast is acceptable because navigator.clipboard is typically blocked in headless Chromium under emergentagent); Achievements section (id='achievements') exposes achievement-0..achievement-3; Cybersecurity uses id='cybersec'; GlobalNetwork lazy-mounts the react-globe.gl canvas inside data-testid='globe-canvas' only after IntersectionObserver fires — verify by scrolling to #network. Only console noise is a Radix DialogTitle a11y warning; no useNavigate or CommandPalette errors observed. Perf on cold load: DCL ~920ms, FCP ~840ms.
rca of the issue: No functional bugs found. The only console output during palette open is a Radix accessibility warning ('DialogContent requires a DialogTitle'); root cause is that shadcn's CommandDialog renders a DialogContent without an accompanying DialogTitle. Mitigation: add a <VisuallyHidden><DialogTitle>Command palette</DialogTitle></VisuallyHidden> block inside CommandPalette.jsx.
